subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath appeared and revealed that whereby the necks of the Pharaohs were broken and the limbs of tyrants trembled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ظهر و اظهر ما انکسرت به اعناق الفراعنه و ارتعدت فرائص الجبابره
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @call to action, @Manifestation of God does not act of own volition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
